name: figma-use
description: Start by downloading this foundational skill that teaches your AI agents what tokens, variables, styles, and components are and how to use them on the canvas.
author: Figma

name: figma-generate-design
description: Create new designs in Figma using existing components and variables.
author: Figma

name: figma-generate-library
description: Create new components in Figma from a codebase.
author: Figma

name: figma-use-figjam
description: Create and modify content in FigJam boards, including stickies, sections, connectors, shapes, tables, and code blocks.
author: Figma

name: figma-use-slides
description: Create and edit presentations in Figma Slides preserving existing styles and layouts.
author: Figma

name: figma-generate-diagram
description: Use with the generate_diagram tool to create architecture diagrams, ERDs, flowcharts, and more in FigJam.
author: Figma

name: generate-project-plan
description: Create a structured project plan in FigJam from a codebase, doc, or prompt.
author: Figma

name: prototype-to-figma
description: Converts a code prototype into multiple static Figma frames with annotated interactions.
author: Amy Lima, Figma and TJ Pitre, Southleft

name: create-voice
description: Generates screen reader specs (VoiceOver, TalkBack, ARIA) from Figma components.
author: Ian Guisard, Uber

name: rad-spacing
description: Applies hierarchical spacing with variables and fallbacks.
author: Nolan Perkins, Rad Collab

name: apply-design-system
description: Connects existing Figma designs to published design system components.
author: Chris Goebel, Edenspiekermann

name: audit-design-system
description: Audits Figma screens for design-system integration drift.
author: Chris Goebel, Edenspiekermann

name: cc-figma-component
description: Generate Figma components from a structured JSON contract file.
author: Nick Villapiano, One North

name: cc-figma-tokens
description: Generate Figma tokens from a structured JSON contract file.
author: Nick Villapiano, One North

name: edit-figma-design
description: Orchestrates Figma design workflows using Warp and Oz
author: Warp

name: multi-agent
description: Run parallel workflows and implement designs in Augment.
author: Augment Code

name: sync-figma-token
description: Sync design tokens between code and Figma variables with drift detection.
author: Anish Karthik, Firebender
